description: REM: Comprehensive overview of TelsonBase platform health, request metrics, security posture, and infrastructure status.

panels.description: REM: Rate of incoming HTTP requests per second, grouped by status code class.
panels.title: Requests per Second

panels.description: REM: Response time percentiles (P50, P95, P99) computed from the request duration histogram.
panels.title: Response Time P50 / P95 / P99

panels.description: REM: Percentage of 4xx and 5xx responses out of total requests. Sustained values above 5% warrant investigation.
panels.title: Error Rate %

panels.description: REM: Number of HTTP requests currently in-flight.
panels.title: Active Requests

panels.description: REM: Count of authentication failures over time. Spikes may indicate brute-force attempts.
panels.title: Auth Failures (5m window)

panels.description: REM: Total audit chain entries recorded. Monotonically increasing counter tracks every auditable event.
panels.title: Audit Chain Entries

panels.description: REM: Number of currently active authenticated sessions.
panels.title: Active Sessions

panels.description: REM: Rate of MFA verification attempts (success and failure).
panels.title: MFA Verifications (5m window)

panels.description: REM: Redis memory consumption. The used_memory metric from redis-exporter tracks how much RAM Redis currently occupies.
panels.title: Redis Memory Usage

panels.description: REM: PostgreSQL active connections vs maximum configured. Approaching the limit causes connection refusal.
panels.title: PostgreSQL Connections

panels.description: REM: Per-container CPU and memory usage from cAdvisor. Helps identify resource-hungry services and validate resource limits.
panels.title: Container Memory Usage

title: TelsonBase Overview
